name: loop-designer
description: One skill that turns any recurring task into a guarded autonomous loop. loop-designer interviews minimally (goal, inputs, output destination, schedule), then generates a five-part loop spec (Discover, Plan, Execute, Verify by a separate verifier checklist, Stop-or-Repeat), a non-negotiable guardrails block (max-iterations cap, cost ceiling, seen-log cross-run dedup, no-destructive-actions allowlist, completion/trip notification), and two ready-to-paste artifacts: a Claude Code Routine prompt for cloud scheduled runs and a local cron/launchd variant. Architecture generalized from a production daily-radar loop, not invented.
